headline: About 10% of Americans used crypto in 2025, highest level since 2022: Fed

article.title: About 10% of Americans used crypto in 2025, highest level since 2022: Fed
article.summary: Among those who used crypto for payments, over 25% said they did so because the business preferred crypto, citing speed, privacy and lower cost advantages.

headline: Echo Protocol's eBTC exploited for $77M in admin key compromise

article.title: Echo Protocol's eBTC exploited for $77M in admin key compromise
article.summary: The hacker has already laundered nearly 5% of the loot through Tornado Cash and is still holding the remaining 955 eBTC.

headline: Oil Declines After Trump Says He Called Off Strike on Iran

article.title: Oil Declines After Trump Says He Called Off Strike on Iran
